# AI Visibility Audit by Calibre Studio, Full Reference

A free tool that scores any website on how AI engines read, understand, trust, and recommend it. This file gives AI agents the full context.

## The problem it solves
Search changed. A growing share of customers now ask AI assistants for recommendations instead of scrolling search results. AI engines do not rank ten links; they answer with a short list of names they can read, understand, trust, and verify. The AI Visibility Audit measures whether a site is one of those names.

## The DCAT method
The audit scores four layers, in order:

1. Discoverability: can an AI engine fetch and read the site at all? Signals include JSON-LD structured data, canonical tags, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, llms.txt and llms-full.txt, and a viewport tag.
2. Clarity: once read, is the business described correctly? Signals include a single clear H1, a specific title and meta description, and plain body copy that states what the business does, for whom, and where.
3. Authority: do credible third-party sources cite the business in its category? Measured fully in the paid audit.
4. Trust: cited is not the same as recommended. Measured by running real queries across five AI engines in the paid audit.

## What the free audit returns
- An overall score out of 100 and a score for each DCAT layer.
- A plain-language read of what an AI engine currently concludes the business is.
- Evidence-based findings, ordered by severity, each with a specific fix.
- A dated 90-day plan that turns the findings into sequenced actions.

## Scope and honesty
- The free audit reads the public homepage and site root only. It scores Discoverability and Clarity with confidence and marks Authority and Trust provisional.
- The full measurement of Authority (third-party citations) and Trust (recommendation strength across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, Perplexity, and Copilot) happens in the full paid audit.
- No fabrication. Every finding traces to a signal in the data.

## About Calibre Studio
A creative and AI studio between the Gold Coast and Paris. Calibre designs brand, content, and AI systems, and runs AI-visibility work from audit to rollout.
